item.title: Auto-groom in sprint loop missing GROOM_MONITOR=true — no live progress output
item.intent: Auto-groom sessions during auto done must show the same real-time backlog change updates as manual groom sessions — silent grooming during a long auto run leaves users wondering if the agent is working.
item.description: In run_sprint_loop(), the auto-groom block calls run_agent 'tech-lead' 'groom' and run_agent 'product-owner' 'groom' without GROOM_MONITOR=true. The run_agent_process poll loop has logic to check backlog file hashes and log progress updates every 10 seconds when GROOM_MONITOR=true (used by run_groom_flow). Without it, auto-groom sessions show only generic 'Waiting for agent...' messages, not the 'backlog.json updated — 5 items (3 ready)' updates that make manual groom sessions informative.
steps: In run_sprint_loop(), change the two run_agent calls in the auto-groom block to prefix GROOM_MONITOR=true
Verify: auto done with low ready items triggers auto-groom and shows backlog update messages during groom
acceptanceCriteria: Auto-groom during auto done shows live backlog change updates matching run_groom_flow behavior
